name: @nest-langchain/demo-visualization
description: Hosted visualization demo for Nest LangChain graphs.

scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/visualization build
scripts.start:dev: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/visualization build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.pretest:e2e: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/visualization build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/visualization build
